creator: Andrew@FreeBSD.org
text:
The problem is the SPCR is trying to tell us the register width is 8 bits, however the PL011 needs a 32 bit width.

In the kernel SPCR parser we have the UART_F_IGNORE_SPCR_REGSHFT flag. This tells the kernel to ignore the bit width value and use the correct register shift value for the hardware.
